restaurants.name: The Green Beanery
restaurants.description: 100% plant-based food crafted from locally grown organic vegetables. We practice complete compostable packaging and zero waste kitchen policies.
restaurants.address: 102, Emerald Plaza, Sector 4, Green Glen Layout, Bengaluru

restaurants.name: Roots & Shoots Cafe
restaurants.description: A charming farm-to-table bistro sourcing 90% of our ingredients within a 50km radius. Serving delicious wholesome vegetarian plates.

restaurants.name: Zero Waste Bistro
restaurants.description: Pioneers of circular dining. Every single ingredient is used entirely, leftovers are composted in-house, and delivery is packed in returnable stainless steel tiffins.

restaurants.name: Re-Bake Artisan Bakery
restaurants.description: Premium organic sourdough and French pastries baked fresh daily.
restaurants.address: Shop 4, Willow Heights, Green Glen Layout, Bengaluru

restaurants.name: The Conscious Carnivore
restaurants.description: We serve organic, free-range, grass-fed meats sourced from local sustainable farms.

restaurants.name: Nectar Juices & Bowls
restaurants.description: Cold-pressed juices and vibrant acai bowls using organic local fruits.
restaurants.address: 22, 24th Main Road, Sector 2, HSR Layout, Bengaluru

foodItems.name: Organic Avocabo Green Salad
foodItems.description: Fresh organic Haas avocado, baby spinach, cucumbers, heirloom cherry tomatoes, pumpkin seeds, tossed in a house-made lemon-herb vinaigrette.

foodItems.name: Quinoa Eco-Buddha Bowl
foodItems.description: Roasted sweet potato, tri-color organic quinoa, steamed edamame, organic beet hummus, broccoli florets, and a creamy tahini drizzle.

foodItems.name: Detoxifying Green Smoothie
foodItems.description: Cold-blended organic kale, Granny Smith apples, ginger, mint leaves, chia seeds, and raw local honey.

foodItems.name: Lentil & Walnut Veggie Burger
foodItems.description: House-made brown lentil & walnut patty, organic cheddar cheese, caramelized onions, local butterhead lettuce, served on a whole-wheat bun.

foodItems.name: Wild Mushroom Truffle Pasta
foodItems.description: Sautéed local oyster and shiitake mushrooms, hand-rolled fettuccine, white truffle oil, and shaved vegan parmesan.

foodItems.name: Upcycled Cauliflower Rice Bowl
foodItems.description: Rice made from grated surplus cauliflower stems, grilled organic tofu, spiced chickpeas, pickled red onions, and herb chimichurri.

foodItems.name: Immunity Ginger Soup
foodItems.description: Warm, slow-simmered vegetable broth made from organic veggie trims, infused with high-grade ginger, turmeric, and lemongrass.

foodItems.name: Country Sourdough Loaf (Fresh)
foodItems.description: Artisanal 36-hour slow fermented country sourdough bread, made with 100% organic locally milled wheat.

foodItems.name: Local Free-Range Grass-Fed Steak
foodItems.description: 250g sirloin steak sourced from grass-fed local pastured cattle, grilled with organic garlic butter and fresh rosemary.

foodItems.name: Organic Pastured Chicken Burger
foodItems.description: Juicy organic grilled chicken breast, wild organic arugula, local tomatoes, avocado spread, on a brioche bun.

foodItems.name: Imperfect Acai Energy Bowl
foodItems.description: Pure organic acai topped with sliced bananas and strawberries, plus organic house granola.

reviews.comment: Hands down the best salad in the city! Love that it comes in compostable packaging.
Great portions, and the rewards tracking really opened my eyes. Highly recommend.
Delicious vegetarian options, local ingredients taste so fresh!
